description: po kliknieciu w obiekt chce miec mozliwosc uploadu zdjecia (ktore musi przejsc przez kompresje by optymalizowac wielkosc projektu) - zdjecie bedzie zwiazane z tym obiektem - bedzie to zdjecie wygladu tej lokalizacji na planie, wiec po klinieciu w obiekt po prawej stronie w ustawienia obiektu, chce widziec galerie zdjec ktora bedzie mozliwa do powiekszenia i przegladania; Uwzglednij zdjecia przy zapisie i imporcie projektu

criteria.description: EditorObject in client/src/lib/types.ts has optional field `photos?: string[]`
criteria.how_to_verify: Read types.ts and confirm `photos?: string[]` exists on the EditorObject interface

criteria.description: EditorAction union in types.ts includes both ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO (payload: {id: string; photoDataUrl: string}) and REMOVE_OBJECT_PHOTO (payload: {id: string; index: number})
criteria.how_to_verify: Read types.ts and confirm both action type literals are present in the EditorAction union

criteria.description: editorReducer in editor-context.tsx handles ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO by appending photoDataUrl to the matching object's photos array, and REMOVE_OBJECT_PHOTO by filtering out the photo at the given index
criteria.how_to_verify: Read editor-context.tsx and confirm case branches for both action types exist with correct immutable array operations

criteria.description: File client/src/core/image-compress.ts exists and exports a function `compressImage` with signature `(file: File) => Promise<string>`
criteria.how_to_verify: Read image-compress.ts and confirm the export signature; confirm it uses HTMLCanvasElement and toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.75)

criteria.description: File client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx exists and accepts props { objectId: string; photos: string[] }
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx and confirm the component definition with those props

criteria.description: PropertiesPanel.tsx renders ObjectPhotoGallery when exactly one object is selected (isMultiSelect is false), passing firstObject.id and firstObject.photos
criteria.how_to_verify: Read PropertiesPanel.tsx and confirm the conditional render block with ObjectPhotoGallery and correct props

criteria.description: handleExportProject in useExport.ts iterates obj.photos and calls toDataUrl on each item, replacing any blob: URLs with data URLs before JSON serialization
criteria.how_to_verify: Read useExport.ts and confirm the finalObjects map includes a photos array resolution step using toDataUrl

criteria.description: IMPORT_PROJECT reducer case in editor-context.tsx already spreads the full payload including objects with their photos arrays — no additional import-side code needed
criteria.how_to_verify: Read editor-context.tsx IMPORT_PROJECT case and confirm it does `{ ...state, ...action.payload }` which will carry over objects[].photos
